name: Jenna Harrow
learned: Jenna Harrow, once Leo's wife, has remained in his life due to their shared commitment to justice. She has a keen intuition for reading people and situations, which complements Leo's abilities. Jenna has her own skills in investigation, but their past makes collaboration complicated.
currently: Jenna is working alongside Leo to assist in the investigation, forcing her to confront old feelings and unresolved issues. She finds herself drawn to Leo's determination but is also wary of the emotional baggage. Most of her time is spent researching leads and supporting Leo in his quest for truth.
lifestyle: Jenna maintains a balanced routine: she wakes up at 8am, practices yoga to clear her mind, and then spends her day investigating. She enjoys a healthy lunch, often preparing meals at home, and spends evenings reading or socializing with friends to unwind after the stress of their work.
living_area: City of Shadows:Poor District:Abandoned Warehouse:Hidden Room
